_usage: Product + Offer template for the Pricing page (/pricing). Emit on /pricing. Models ONLY what is real per pricing.md: a free self-host Offer with price 0, and a cloud Offer that is usage-based with NO fabricated price (use priceSpecification with a note / a quote URL, never an invented number). Do NOT add aggregateRating or review — there are none. The two Offers render as the two side-by-side cards on the page. When a real cloud figure is signed off by the maintainer, replace the cloud Offer's description-only pricing with a concrete priceSpecification. The Product references the Organization (brand) and the SoftwareApplication via @id.
name: Oraclous
description: Oraclous is an open-source agentic AI operations platform. Self-host it free, or run the cloud-hosted mode with identical data-sovereignty guarantees. Because Oraclous is BYOM, you pay your model provider directly — there is no markup on tokens.

offers.name: Open source — self-host
offers.description: Open source and free to self-host on your own infrastructure, including air-gapped environments. ReBAC governance, audit, provenance, metering, and OHM portability are included as substrate. You hold the keys; you pay your model provider directly under BYOM.

offers.name: Cloud — Oraclous-hosted
offers.description: Usage-based managed hosting with identical data-sovereignty guarantees to self-host: customer-held keys, KMS separation so staff cannot decrypt your state, ReBAC, provenance, and OHM portability. Pricing is sized per isolation tier and volume — contact Oraclous for a quote. No markup on model tokens (BYOM).

priceSpecification.description: Usage-based — quoted per isolation tier and volume. No published flat figure (TODO: replace with a concrete priceSpecification once a real pricing decision is signed off; do not fabricate a number).
